creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is the configuration I do all my build testing with. Combined with "c++: error: unable to execute command: Killed" I'm guessing that you've run out of swap space (check dmesg to see why the process was killed).

You might try running /tmp/TransAutoreleasePool-692b28.sh and seeing if it runs to completion. If so, you may be able to succeed with DISABLE_MAKE_JOBS set.
